rows.en: If I had more time, I would read more books.
rows.ja: もっと時間があれば、もっと本を読むのに。

rows.en: If it were sunny today, we would go to the park.
rows.ja: 今日は晴れていたら、公園に行くのに。

rows.en: If I were taller, I would play basketball.
rows.ja: もっと背が高ければ、バスケットボールをするのに。

rows.en: If she were here now, she would know what to do.
rows.ja: 今ここに彼女がいたら、どうすればいいかわかるのに。

rows.en: If I had enough money, I would buy a new desk.
rows.ja: 十分なお金があれば、新しい机を買うのに。

rows.en: If he studied harder, he would get better grades.
rows.ja: 彼がもっと一生けんめい勉強すれば、もっといい成績を取るのに。

rows.en: If my room were bigger, I would put a sofa in it.
rows.ja: 私の部屋がもっと広ければ、そこにソファを置くのに。

rows.en: If we lived near the station, we would walk there.
rows.ja: 私たちが駅の近くに住んでいたら、そこまで歩くのに。

rows.en: If I knew her phone number, I would call her.
rows.ja: 彼女の電話番号を知っていたら、彼女に電話するのに。

rows.en: If this bag were lighter, I would carry it myself.
rows.ja: このかばんがもっと軽ければ、自分で持つのに。

rows.en: If I were free tonight, I would join you.
rows.ja: 今夜ひまだったら、あなたたちに合流するのに。

rows.en: If the water were warmer, I would swim in it.
rows.ja: 水がもっとあたたかければ、泳ぐのに。

rows.en: If Noah had a bicycle, he would ride to school.
rows.ja: ノアが自転車を持っていたら、自転車で学校に行くのに。

rows.en: If Emma were not so busy, she would help us.
rows.ja: エマがそんなに忙しくなければ、私たちを手伝うのに。

rows.en: If I had a map, I would take a different road.
rows.ja: 地図があれば、別の道を行くのに。

rows.en: If the store were open now, I would buy some bread.
rows.ja: その店が今開いていたら、パンを買うのに。

rows.en: If we had a little more space, we would eat here.
rows.ja: もう少し場所があれば、ここで食べるのに。

rows.en: If I were better at cooking, I would make dinner tonight.
rows.ja: もっと料理が得意なら、今夜は夕食を作るのに。

rows.en: If he were kinder, more people would talk to him.
rows.ja: 彼がもっと親切なら、もっと多くの人が彼に話しかけるのに。

rows.en: If I had your notebook, I would check the answer.
rows.ja: あなたのノートがあれば、答えを確認するのに。

rows.en: If the library were closer, I would go there more often.
rows.ja: 図書館がもっと近ければ、もっとよくそこへ行くのに。

rows.en: If I were stronger, I would carry this box upstairs.
rows.ja: もっと力があれば、この箱を上の階まで運ぶのに。

rows.en: If my phone worked, I would send you a message.
rows.ja: 私のスマホが使えれば、あなたにメッセージを送るのに。

rows.en: If we had more chairs, everyone would sit down.
rows.ja: もっといすがあれば、みんな座るのに。

rows.en: If the classroom were quieter, I would study better.
rows.ja: 教室がもっと静かなら、もっと集中して勉強できるのに。

rows.en: If I had a camera, I would take a picture of this view.
rows.ja: カメラがあれば、この景色の写真を撮るのに。

rows.en: If she were taller, she would reach that shelf.
rows.ja: 彼女がもっと背が高ければ、その棚に手が届くのに。

rows.en: If it were not so cold, I would open the window.
rows.ja: そんなに寒くなければ、窓を開けるのに。

rows.en: If I had more energy, I would clean my room today.
rows.ja: もっと元気があれば、今日は部屋をそうじするのに。

rows.en: If he were at home, he would answer the door.
rows.ja: 彼が家にいたら、ドアに出るのに。

rows.en: If I knew the way, I would go alone.
rows.ja: 道を知っていたら、一人で行くのに。

rows.en: If this chair were softer, I would sit here longer.
rows.ja: このいすがもっとやわらかければ、もっと長くここに座るのに。

rows.en: If we were on the same team, we would practice together.
rows.ja: 私たちが同じチームなら、いっしょに練習するのに。

rows.en: If I had a little more courage, I would ask that question.
rows.ja: もう少し勇気があれば、その質問をするのに。

rows.en: If the test were easier, I would feel better.
rows.ja: そのテストがもっとやさしければ、もっと気が楽なのに。

rows.en: If my hands were clean, I would help you cook.
rows.ja: 手がきれいなら、料理を手伝うのに。

rows.en: If she had more free time, she would visit her grandmother.
rows.ja: 彼女にもっと自由な時間があれば、おばあちゃんを訪ねるのに。

rows.en: If I were not so tired, I would go for a walk.
rows.ja: そんなに疲れていなければ、散歩に行くのに。

rows.en: If the bus stop were nearer, we would use the bus more often.
rows.ja: バス停がもっと近ければ、もっとよくバスを使うのに。

rows.en: If I had your number, I would invite you.
rows.ja: あなたの連絡先があれば、あなたを誘うのに。

rows.en: If this computer were faster, I would use it every day.
rows.ja: このパソコンがもっと速ければ、毎日使うのに。

rows.en: If he were more careful, he would make fewer mistakes.
rows.ja: 彼がもっと注意深ければ、ミスはもっと少ないのに。

rows.en: If I had a quiet place, I would study there.
rows.ja: 静かな場所があれば、そこで勉強するのに。

rows.en: If I had an extra umbrella, I would lend it to you.
rows.ja: 予備のかさがあれば、あなたに貸すのに。

rows.en: If we had a garden, I would grow tomatoes.
rows.ja: 庭があれば、トマトを育てるのに。

rows.en: If I were good at art, I would draw my own cards.
rows.ja: 絵が得意なら、自分でカードを描くのに。

rows.en: If the train were not late, we would arrive on time.
rows.ja: 電車が遅れていなければ、時間どおりに着くのに。

rows.en: If I got a little more sleep, I would feel fine.
rows.ja: もう少し眠れたら、もっと元気になれるのに。

rows.en: If I had a ladder, I could clean that window.
rows.ja: はしごがあれば、その窓をそうじできるのに。

rows.en: If she spoke English, she could help the tourist.
rows.ja: 彼女が英語を話せたら、その旅行者を助けられるのに。

rows.en: If we had more time, we could visit the museum.
rows.ja: もっと時間があれば、その博物館に行けるのに。

rows.en: If I had some water, I could take this medicine.
rows.ja: 水があれば、この薬を飲めるのに。

rows.en: If the room were brighter, I could read this map.
rows.ja: 部屋がもっと明るければ、この地図が読めるのに。

rows.en: If he had your number, he could call you.
rows.ja: 彼があなたの番号を知っていれば、あなたに電話できるのに。

rows.en: If I were calmer, I could answer better.
rows.ja: もっと落ち着いていれば、もっとうまく答えられるのに。

rows.en: If we had a car, we could go to the lake.
rows.ja: 車があれば、その湖に行けるのに。

rows.en: If Emma were here, she could explain it.
rows.ja: エマがここにいれば、それを説明できるのに。

rows.en: If I had a printer, I could print this page.
rows.ja: プリンターがあれば、このページを印刷できるのに。

rows.en: If the bus were not late, we could catch the train.
rows.ja: バスが遅れていなければ、その電車に乗れるのに。

rows.en: If Noah knew the answer, he could tell us.
rows.ja: ノアが答えを知っていれば、私たちに教えられるのに。

rows.en: If I had a key, I could open the door.
rows.ja: 鍵があれば、そのドアを開けられるのに。

rows.en: If this box were lighter, I could carry it alone.
rows.ja: この箱がもっと軽ければ、一人で運べるのに。

rows.en: If we were closer to the sea, we could swim every weekend.
rows.ja: 海がもっと近ければ、毎週末泳げるのに。

rows.en: If I had your schedule, I could choose a better time.
rows.ja: あなたの予定がわかれば、もっとよい時間を選べるのに。

rows.en: If she were more careful, she could avoid those mistakes.
rows.ja: 彼女がもっと注意深ければ、そのミスを防げるのに。

rows.en: If I had a little more space, I could put a desk here.
rows.ja: もう少し場所があれば、ここに机を置けるのに。

rows.en: If I had a flashlight, I could look under the bed.
rows.ja: 懐中電灯があれば、ベッドの下を見られるのに。

rows.en: If he had a key card, he could enter the building.
rows.ja: 彼がカードキーを持っていれば、その建物に入れるのに。

rows.en: If I were stronger, I could lift this bag.
rows.ja: もっと力があれば、このバッグを持ち上げられるのに。

rows.en: If we had better weather, we could play outside.
rows.ja: もっと天気がよければ、外で遊べるのに。

rows.en: If my glasses were here, I could read this sign.
rows.ja: めがねがここにあれば、この標識が読めるのに。

rows.en: If she had a laptop, she could finish the report.
rows.ja: 彼女がノートパソコンを持っていれば、そのレポートを終えられるのに。

rows.en: If I knew the rule, I could answer this question.
rows.ja: そのルールがわかっていれば、この問題に答えられるのに。

rows.en: If the road were dry, we could ride our bikes.
rows.ja: 道が乾いていれば、自転車に乗れるのに。

rows.en: If we had a bigger table, everyone could sit together.
rows.ja: もっと大きいテーブルがあれば、みんなでいっしょに座れるのに。

rows.en: If I were not so tired, I could help you tonight.
rows.ja: そんなに疲れていなければ、今夜あなたを手伝えるのに。

rows.en: If he listened carefully, he could understand the teacher.
rows.ja: 彼が注意して聞けば、先生の話を理解できるのに。

rows.en: If I had binoculars, I could see the stars better.
rows.ja: 双眼鏡があれば、もっとよく星が見えるのに。

rows.en: If she had a dictionary, she could look up that word.
rows.ja: 彼女が辞書を持っていれば、その単語を調べられるのに。

rows.en: If there were two seats left, we could sit together.
rows.ja: 席が二つ空いていれば、いっしょに座れるのに。

rows.en: If I had one more ticket, I could invite you.
rows.ja: もう1枚チケットがあれば、あなたを誘えるのに。

rows.en: I wish I knew the answer.
rows.ja: 答えがわかればいいのに。

rows.en: I wish I had more free time.
rows.ja: もっと自由な時間があればいいのに。

rows.en: I wish I could speak English better.
rows.ja: もっと英語を上手に話せたらな。

rows.en: I wish my room were cleaner.
rows.ja: 部屋がもっときれいだったらいいのに。

rows.en: I wish I had a bike.
rows.ja: 自転車があればな。

rows.en: I wish it were warmer today.
rows.ja: 今日はもう少しあたたかければいいのに。

rows.en: I wish my bag were lighter.
rows.ja: かばんがもう少し軽ければな。

rows.en: I wish I could play the piano.
rows.ja: ピアノが弾けたらいいのに。

rows.en: I wish we were in the same class.
rows.ja: 同じクラスだったらいいのに。

rows.en: I wish I had my notebook with me.
rows.ja: ノートを今持っていればいいのに。

rows.en: If I were you, I would talk to her first.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、まず彼女に話すよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would ask the teacher.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、先生に聞くよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would take a short break.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、少し休むよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would not worry too much.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、あまり心配しないよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would check the answer again.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、もう一度答えを確認するよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would go home early tonight.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、今夜は早く帰るよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would tell the truth.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、本当のことを言うよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would write it down.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、それを書いておくよ。

rows.en: If I were you, I would drink some water.
rows.ja: 私があなただったら、水を飲むよ。
